service.title: Write Rate
service.tip: Cluster-wide writes per second across measure + stream + trace data models.

service.title: Query Rate
service.tip: Cluster-wide gRPC query calls per second seen at the liaison front door.

service.title: Error Rate
service.tip: Cluster-wide errors per minute (gRPC + registry + stream-msg + publish + sync-loop). Absent renders as 0 on a healthy cluster.

service.title: CPU Cores
service.tip: Total CPU cores visible across the cluster's containers.

service.title: Memory Used
service.tip: Total memory used across the cluster.

service.title: Disk Used
service.tip: Total on-disk bytes used across the cluster's data paths.

service.title: Cluster Throughput
service.tip: Write vs query rate over time.

service.title: Containers by Role
service.tip: Live container count per role (data / liaison), derived from the system uptime gauge. The lifecycle sidecar runs no system collector, so it never appears here.

instance.title: Time Since Last Sync
instance.tip: How long ago the last migration cycle started, e.g. "5m 20s ago". Appears once the first migration cycle has run.

instance.title: Last Sync
instance.tip: Whether the last migration cycle succeeded or failed.

instance.title: Migration Cycles
instance.tip: Cumulative tier-migration cycles run by the lifecycle sidecar.

instance.title: CPU Usage
instance.tip: Process CPU consumption in cores.

instance.title: GC Pause (avg)
instance.tip: Average Go GC pause per cycle.

instance.title: Uptime
instance.tip: Days since the node started. Absent on the lifecycle sidecar (no system collector).

instance.title: Disk Usage
instance.tip: Used / total across the node's data paths.

instance.title: Disk Used / Total
instance.tip: Used per data path, against total filesystem capacity. Paths sharing one filesystem report identical figures.

instance.title: Network I/O
instance.tip: Per-interface receive / send throughput.

instance.title: Query Rate by Service
instance.tip: gRPC query calls/s split by BanyanDB data-model service (measure / stream / trace / property).

instance.title: gRPC Errors / min
instance.tip: Sum of total + registry + stream-msg gRPC errors. Lazily registered — absent renders as 0 on a healthy liaison.

instance.title: Registry Ops / s
instance.tip: Schema-registry operations/s seen at the liaison front door.

instance.title: Write Rate
instance.tip: Writes/s seen at the liaison front door across the three data models.

instance.title: Publish Throughput
instance.tip: Tier-2 publish pipeline (liaison → data), broken out by operation.

instance.title: Publish p99 Latency
instance.tip: p99 send latency of the tier-2 publish pipeline, per operation.

instance.title: Part-sync Bytes
instance.tip: Bytes/s streamed to data nodes on the part-sync (file-sync) path. The queue_pub sent-bytes counter only ticks on chunked file-sync — regular write/query publishes are not counted here.

instance.title: Write Queue Pending
instance.tip: Liaison write-buffer depth: records buffered at the front door before publish.

instance.title: Publish Batch Throughput
instance.tip: Batches published/s by operation. Hidden until the cluster emits batch metrics.

instance.title: Stored Data Elements
instance.tip: Total file elements stored across measure + stream + trace.

instance.title: Write Queue (wqueue)
instance.tip: Data-node write queue: pending records, on-disk file parts, in-memory parts.

instance.title: Merge File Latency
instance.tip: Average on-disk file-merge latency per merge loop.

instance.title: Merge Parts / Loop
instance.tip: Average parts merged per on-disk merge loop.

instance.title: Inverted Index Rate
instance.tip: Series-index updates and term searches per second (measure + stream storage + stream tst).

instance.title: Index Documents
instance.tip: Total inverted-index documents (series proxy).

instance.title: Subscribe Throughput
instance.tip: Subscribe-side queue throughput by operation (query / file-sync / batch-write / control).

instance.title: Retention Disk Usage
instance.tip: Per data-model retention disk-usage percentage.

instance.title: Subscribe Message Throughput
instance.tip: Per-record processing rate the subscriber unpacks from batches.

endpoint.title: Measure Write / s
endpoint.tip: Writes per second for this group (per data-model write counter).

endpoint.title: Measure Query Latency
endpoint.tip: Mean liaison query latency for this group.

endpoint.title: Measure Total Data
endpoint.tip: Current stored data elements for this group.

endpoint.title: Measure Merge Rate
endpoint.tip: File merge-loop iterations per minute.

endpoint.title: Measure Merge Latency
endpoint.tip: Mean file-merge latency per merge loop.

endpoint.title: Measure Merge Partitions
endpoint.tip: Avg parts merged per file merge loop.

endpoint.title: Measure Series Write / s
endpoint.tip: Inverted-index updates per second (series-write proxy).

endpoint.title: Measure Term Search / s
endpoint.tip: Inverted-index term-search invocations per second (index read pressure).

endpoint.title: Measure Total Series
endpoint.tip: Total inverted-index documents (series proxy) for this group.

endpoint.title: Stream Write / s
endpoint.tip: Writes per second for this group (per data-model write counter).

endpoint.title: Stream Query Latency
endpoint.tip: Mean liaison query latency for this group.

endpoint.title: Stream Total Data
endpoint.tip: Current stored data elements for this group.

endpoint.title: Stream Merge Rate
endpoint.tip: File merge-loop iterations per minute.

endpoint.title: Stream Merge Latency
endpoint.tip: Mean file-merge latency per merge loop.

endpoint.title: Stream Merge Partitions
endpoint.tip: Avg parts merged per file merge loop.

endpoint.title: Stream Series Write / s
endpoint.tip: Inverted-index updates per second (series-write proxy).

endpoint.title: Stream TST Index Write / s
endpoint.tip: Stream tst-scope inverted-index updates per second (distinct from the storage-scope series index).

endpoint.title: Stream Term Search / s
endpoint.tip: Inverted-index term-search invocations per second (index read pressure).

endpoint.title: Stream Total Series
endpoint.tip: Total inverted-index documents (series proxy) for this group.

endpoint.title: Stream TST Total Series
endpoint.tip: Stream tst-scope index document total (distinct from the storage-scope series index).

endpoint.title: Trace Write / s
endpoint.tip: Writes per second for this group (per data-model write counter).

endpoint.title: Trace Query Latency
endpoint.tip: Mean liaison query latency for this group.

endpoint.title: Trace Total Data
endpoint.tip: Current stored data elements for this group.

endpoint.title: Trace Merge Rate
endpoint.tip: File merge-loop iterations per minute.

endpoint.title: Trace Merge Latency
endpoint.tip: Mean file-merge latency per merge loop.

endpoint.title: Trace Merge Partitions
endpoint.tip: Avg parts merged per file merge loop.

endpoint.title: Trace Series Write / s
endpoint.tip: Inverted-index updates per second (series-write proxy).

endpoint.title: Trace Term Search / s
endpoint.tip: Inverted-index term-search invocations per second (index read pressure).

endpoint.title: Trace Total Series
endpoint.tip: Total inverted-index documents (series proxy) for this group.

endpoint.title: Property Index Write / s
endpoint.tip: Property registry inverted-index updates per second (property's write signal).

endpoint.title: Property Index Merge Rate
endpoint.tip: Property inverted-index segment merges per minute (property has no tst merge loop).

endpoint.title: Property Index Merge Latency
endpoint.tip: Mean property inverted-index merge latency.

endpoint.title: Property Term Search / s
endpoint.tip: Property term-search invocations per second — property is read via the registry/term-search path, not the liaison query method, so this is its read-load signal.

endpoint.title: Property Total Series
endpoint.tip: Total property inverted-index documents for this group.

endpoint.title: Subscribe Throughput
endpoint.tip: Subscribe-side queue messages per second for this group, by operation.

endpoint.title: Publish p99
endpoint.tip: Publish-side queue p99 latency for this group.

endpoint.title: Batch Throughput
endpoint.tip: Per-group write-batch rate, by operation.

endpoint.title: Message Throughput
endpoint.tip: Per-group per-record rate, by operation.

endpoint.title: Part-sync Bytes / s
endpoint.tip: Part-sync (file-sync) bytes per second for this group. Only the chunked part-streaming path increments this — regular write/query publishes are not counted.
